name: Clams Casino
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Wash and scrub clams, discarding any that are open.
3. Place clams on a baking sheet and bake until shells open, discarding any that don't open. Remove meat from the shell and chop. Reserve chopped clams and half of the shells.
4. Heat oil and butter in a small skillet. Add onion, green pepper, and garlic; sauté until soft. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Add bread crumbs, crumbled bacon, oregano, parmesan cheese, and reserved clam meat to the onion mixture; mix well.
6. Fill reserved clam shells with the clam mixture. Sprinkle with parsley and paprika. Drizzle with olive oil.
7. Bake for 7 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and serve hot, with lemon wedges.
